title: oxalis lotoides
intro: Oxalis lotoides, also known as the wood sorrel or creeping wood sorrel, is a perennial herb that belongs to the wood sorrel family (Oxalidaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oxalis lotoides include its ability to help treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach ulcers, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Oxalis lotoides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
